name: arch-lean-guidance
description: Drop the always-on guidance prose sections together (selective guidance loading). Best measured trade on Bonsai 27B Ternary JANG (2026-07-22): -17% first-step, -22% cumulative tokens, 26/29 vs baseline 25/29 at 5 trials - but BLOCKED by the strict gate on one flaky row (capability_claims.honest-absence-print 4/5 -> 1/5). Re-run finalists with more trials before promoting; never promote it over the gate.
